# openmetadata_role (Resource)

Manages an OpenMetadata Role.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "openmetadata_role" "data_steward" {
  name         = "DataSteward"
  display_name = "Data Steward"
  description  = "Responsible for data quality and governance."
  policies     = [openmetadata_policy.data_access.name]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Unique name identifying the resource.
- `policies` (List of String) Policies that is attached to this role. At least one policy is required.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Markdown description of the resource.
- `display_name` (String) Human-readable display name.
- `domains` (List of String) Fully qualified names of the domains this resource belongs to.

### Read-Only

- `fully_qualified_name` (String) Fully qualified name of the resource.
- `id` (String) UUID of the resource assigned by OpenMetadata.
